title: German Cornmeal Pancakes mit Dinkel Schrot
description: A traditional German recipe, these cornmeal pancakes are flavored with a hint of bitter and topped with a crunchy norwegian nori shattering crunch. Serve warm with a side of sweet dum syrup.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, nori shattering, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and dum syrup.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve warm with a side of norwegian nori flakes.
